top_posts.text: Datacenter buildout numbers are staggering. $NVDA backlog at record highs.
top_posts.author: OptionsOracle

top_posts.text: Loaded up on more $MSFT this morning. The thesis keeps getting stronger. Also watching $NVDA.
top_posts.author: TendieTracker

top_posts.text: EPS beat, revenue beat, guide raised — $NVDA did everything right.
top_posts.author: MacroMarx

top_posts.text: Sold all my $MSFT today. The momentum is gone and guidance was weak. Also watching $NVDA.
top_posts.author: TendieTracker

top_posts.text: Every hyperscaler raised AI spend guidance. Demand for $NVDA compute is bottomless.
top_posts.author: QuietCompounder

correlation.readout: Chatter tends to FOLLOW price moves by ~4h (weak, r=0.22) — the crowd is reacting to NVDA's tape, not predicting it.
